benefits: Priority access to IEEE GUB workshops, competitions, and conferences
Leadership opportunities in IEEE GUB Student Branch and chapters
Mentorship from seniors, alumni, and invited industry experts
Certificates and volunteer credits from IEEE GUB activities
Global IEEE member recognition and networking
steps: Complete the IEEE online membership form
Select societies that match your interests (e.g., CS, PES)
Send your IEEE membership confirmation to IEEE GUB

faqs.question: Do I need to be a CSE student to join IEEE GUB?
faqs.answer: No. Students from any department at GUB can join the IEEE Student Branch.

faqs.question: How do I complete IEEE GUB onboarding?
faqs.answer: After joining IEEE, send your membership confirmation to IEEE GUB through the contact form for onboarding.

faqs.question: Can I attend events without membership?
faqs.answer: Yes. Many events are open to all students, but IEEE GUB members get priority access and discounts.
